response.justification: Candidate is a Senior/Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level role. While the technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes) far exceed requirements, this is a significant overqualification mismatch with high flight risk and likely compensation expectations beyond an entry-level budget. No PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience explicitly listed (MongoDB primarily), and no renewable energy/construction domain exposure. The on-site requirement in Berlin matches location, but the seniority gap makes this a poor fit.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Strong fullstack breadth including AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (primary DB experience is MongoDB)
High flight risk and likely salary expectations exceed junior-role budget
